textByHashes.3cdcb180abcdfe517936df5881ab092e84e5a65e: Please jester, we don't have time for entertainment right now.
textByHashes.59faede890d363c9bc887d13c1f02fb9054b16ee: Guards, what is this outlander doing in the Burgher's chambers?
textByHashes.09a5b3b87a42c7391920f7884cb5af62526b2f1c: Well you are on the wrong island. You should return to Rellekka and ask Mord to take you to Jatizso.
textByHashes.d1a5eb695801b021ffd8b0f91c4a031a5e4302c0: When do we assault the caves?
textByHashes.c10f1d3f2cd0fedb395dd61e850be39038a82226: Good, my recruits are nearly ready
textByHashes.819a63ce7394b92616ea3ff88d03075eafe24cde: And the two bridges we need repaired?
textByHashes.77243bc3752a2e2da9f64424700f7e3779036712: You may find a bridge to a small isle, rich in resources. You will not be able to repair it, as I still have to replace the main supports. Leave that bridge - we don't need it to make our raid.
textByHashes.39e2ab404b799dc61c3ae8803ed733dae8c7ca82: You should speak to Burgher Mawnis Burowgar about repairing our bridges.
textByHashes.417338b4f70e342c1924a37d9898b56e307c0490: Our militia are still preparing themselves for our raid against the trolls.
textByHashes.f5c98ff0bdbdda3a08f710f9429559f399ba70ba: Have you found out about Jatizso's plans yet?
textByHashes.acf237c71c25fee0b9b0bef3d9bb574dac2d1d97: Hello jester. Have a chat with the Burgher, I think he's in the mood for jest.
textByHashes.8400f9888b26b31ac45195a3d53cc5edc2d3af33: So what do you think of the Burgher's Champion?
textByHashes.263850b2189346d7f933a3509c48ba6d30eaae3c: What about their collaboration with King Sorvott?
textByHashes.e9b2c410abc960fab70cb54b92b1db2a49998d95: And the Champion did help repair your bridges.
textByHashes.577fd33e448377d18786f509aaa3fbdf6b0fbf61: I have them anchored near Etceteria.
textByHashes.2d01d33dc469681431484fca4d0af92194946396: Then we are ready to launch our raid at dawn?
textByHashes.bc13e479bedc3678079acb31eb8881578ca75680: Blasted spies, how can King Sorvott call himself a Fremennik when he resorts to such dishonourable tactics?
textByHashes.6afc4293cba1b93ce8ee87f455fb9782f523eefb: Indeed, it is written in the sagas of Neitiznot that the Champion of the isle must equip himself with the tools of a Fremennik warrior.
textByHashes.ca62c3073ea5ba774f4f2b4c44cc6b34f81200ed: To make the traditional armour of a Neitiznot warrior you will need some yak-hide to make the armour.
textByHashes.75bbed396cd22124d5129eac81cefe617eca4c0f: Once you have the yak-hide, Thakkrad can cure it for you.
textByHashes.30f8fd65ea5a31a0f89b5683dd2981ea9e2d3dd4: To make the shield you will need some arctic pine, rope and bronze nails. Then you will need to find the 'Woodcutting stumps' to make make the shield on.
textByHashes.78ddad79769ce2a6d3bc7e85995d61d39473db83: You will find the Woodcutting stumps near the town's 'geyser'.
textByHashes.be147fa047409e68a42f7595b4c23b7e1a58ed80: Praise be; may the blood of our ancestors flow strongly in our new Champion.
textByHashes.269200f431226251f5e399b9e0c9d6bbac627a32: My guards have secured a foothold within the easternmost caves.
textByHashes.f244cc3cb0fcf9c4c35be76e1c33002f8174a3b6: We have not seen Jatizso's militia yet, but some of my scouts have reported hearing distant fighting in the tunnels.
textByHashes.5fe646c8dd52584f30e7b3caaf5cfa9611fd3d35: You should head to the eastern end of the northern isle. You don't want to run in to Jatizso's troops now.
textByHashes.66785d87face441d0cbd15eec70543e6bdf13bc4: Our militia have entered the caves to the east of the northern isle.
textByHashes.55c77a5ed16cc0b46a18ba36966d37eaf8b79b72: You should hurry to meet them before they are discovered by the trolls. Make sure you go to the right cave entrance, otherwise you won't find them!
textByHashes.aac29e32d4fdc05e719067ebdb94fc3a5c682ff1: Do you bring proof of your victory?
textByHashes.ddc34dee65eb2b7e717b21655f4a6796cb435068: You should bring proof to present to the Burgher.
textByHashes.4d98c6fca03d2fb53fa24675f79883cab94f1867: Praise be to our brave Champion.
textByHashes.6f7ed051ee7eb3a8728a52fc32da2dde04a6f54c: Congratulations, Champion . Thank you for defeating the Troll King.
